raw.message: Captain America, Spider-Man, Thor, Shuri, Mister Fantastic & more await your summons to battle!

hook.summary: Hulk and The Thing engage in a high-intensity fighting match.
hook.visual_action: Hulk punches The Thing repeatedly in a jungle-themed arena with a 'FIGHT' overlay.
hook.text_overlay: MARVEL CONTEST OF CHAMPIONS, PLAY ANYWHERE, DOWNLOAD FREE

scene_flow: The 'FIGHT' prompt initiates a battle between Hulk and The Thing in a jungle arena.
Hulk executes a rapid combo of punches, visibly depleting The Thing's health bar.
The screen displays 'PLAY ANYWHERE' and 'DOWNLOAD FREE' alongside platform icons over a space background.
audience_proxy: Marvel fans and competitive gamers looking for high-quality mobile fighting experiences.
